objective: Verify the committed master-plan v2, repaired v3 viewport, and compiler-continuity rebaseline from a disposable clean worktree, then retain one final R0 acceptance receipt.
next_action: Commit the verified R0.4 continuity package, create a disposable clean worktree at that commit, run generated-view, recovery, focused compiler, and complete Forge gates there, then record the R0 acceptance result and advance to the next dependency-ready humanoid proof package.
research_gate: No new research is needed for R0.5; verify only the committed bounded package and stop on provenance, recovery, authority, coherence, or full-gate failure.
authority_lane: Owner-authorized implementation of the approved master plan. No external downloads, heartbeat resumption, artifact promotion, owner-observation inference, spending, publishing, credentials, engine selection, external execution, or protected-Kernel mutation.
context_health: Green for bounded R0.5 verification. Forge capture was current before the full gate; the live UI is intentionally stopped during desktop build verification and must be restarted afterward. Heartbeat remains paused.
unresolved_risks: A clean disposable worktree has not yet reproduced the rebaseline.
The complete gate must be rerun against committed rather than dirty state.
The v3 fixture remains structurally verified but not perceptually approved.
evidence_requirements: representative long-corpus fixed hash and replay
legacy SQLite migration and immediate directory deletion
restored current capture with heartbeat paused
verification_plan: commit the focused and full-gate-passing R0.4 package
create a disposable Git worktree at the commit
run bootstrap-independent generated-view and canonical verifiers
run focused compiler continuity and recovery tests
run the complete Forge gate with no running disposable Forge executable
remove the disposable worktree only after resolving and checking its absolute path
restart the primary Forge UI and verify current capture
record exact pass/failure evidence and advance the canonical next action
resume_after: Continue automatically after status updates. Ask the owner only if a real authority boundary or unresolvable safety decision is reached.
verification_receipts: R0.2 registry v2 and generated owner view verified
R0.3 viewport repair: 12 reference-viewport and 9 viewport-stimulus tests pass
R0.4 complete Forge gate passes in the primary worktree
transition: pre-approval transfer checkpoint -> owner-approved master plan v2 -> R0.2 registry consolidation -> R0.3 v3 repair -> R0.4 compiler continuity verified -> R0.5 disposable acceptance executing
